chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6510 of 2018 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing of case For hearing of main case. 21-04-2025 None present for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for respondent department Ms. Mahreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General This petition is pending since 2018 without any progress. Even seven years later petitioner remains unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
